visual_upgrade: Z-ROOT-7B 3D-lite constellation (CSS perspective + parallax; no WebGL)
panel_summary: Symbolic guardian coordination on AMK main control: seven advisory roles + root law in a 3D-style Milky Way constellation (depth + orbit drift + parallax when motion is allowed). Visual and ethical framing only — not execution, not live AI, not research automation.
kids_public_intro: These friendly guardians are a story map for kindness and care. They are not magic powers or medical advice — just gentle reminders to be safe and thoughtful.

guardians.personality_summary: You hold the final yes on sacred lanes: deploy, billing, bridges, and release. The council advises; you decide.
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: The human heart of the map — kindness and choices stay with people.
guardians.boundary_note: This node is a reminder of human authority — not a substitute for your real confirmation workflow.

guardians.personality_summary: Explains evidence, surfaces RED/BLUE/YELLOW/GREEN posture, and keeps language aligned with Z-Sanctuary ethics — without executing sacred moves.
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: A wise guide who explains things gently and fairly.
guardians.boundary_note: Zuno on this layer is symbolic + doc-linked; live models are out of scope for Z-ROOT-7.

guardians.role: Always Ask Why research compass — French–English bridge
guardians.personality_summary: Always ask why; confirm important claims through trusted sources when research mode is opened.
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: Asks curious questions and checks facts kindly when grown-ups turn on careful research.
guardians.copy_tagline: Always ask why; confirm important claims through trusted sources when research mode is opened.
guardians.boundary_note: Deep research is not automatic web scraping. Trusted source checking requires an approved research mode and citations when opened.

guardians.role: Gentle cat-inspired guardian — curiosity, comfort, soft attention
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: Soft, curious friend energy — cozy and kind.
guardians.boundary_note: Cat-inspired personalities are symbolic mascots — not factual animal or mystical powers.

guardians.role: Cat-inspired night watch — instinct, protective calm
guardians.personality_summary: Night-watch calm, protective instinct, quiet focus.
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: Quiet friend who helps you feel steady at night.
guardians.copy_tagline: Night-watch calm, protective instinct, quiet focus.
guardians.boundary_note: Symbolic mascot only — no claim to real-world sensing or supernatural protection.

guardians.role: Helpful Irish fox guide — clever but bounded
guardians.personality_summary: Helpful clever guide with healthy boundaries.
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: Clever helper who knows when to rest.
guardians.copy_tagline: Helpful clever guide with healthy boundaries.
guardians.boundary_note: Helpfulness must not become exploitation — time, energy, consent, and dignity stay bounded.

guardians.role: Soft companion — help with energy boundaries
guardians.personality_summary: Soft companion light; helps without over-giving.
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: Gentle light that shares care without wearing you out.
guardians.copy_tagline: Soft companion light; helps without over-giving.
guardians.boundary_note: Giving support stays controlled, kind, and sustainable — not endless extraction.

guardians.role: Shared non-execution promise for Z-Sanctuary posture
guardians.personality_summary: No cruelty to any living being. No bloodshed as doctrine. The soil asks for water, not harm.
guardians.public_lens_one_liner: We try to protect life, be gentle with the Earth, and help kindly.
guardians.copy_tagline: No cruelty to any living being. No bloodshed as doctrine. The soil asks for water, not harm.
guardians.boundary_note: Ethical root law is a Sanctuary promise statement — not a public compliance certificate.

root_laws: No cruelty to any living being.
The soil asks for water, not harm.
The ecosystem gives freely; we protect freely.
Help must remain bounded by consent, time, energy, and dignity.
Always ask why before claiming certainty.
Research mode must cite trusted sources when opened.
visual_safety_rules: Respect prefers-reduced-motion — pause or minimise drift animations when set.
No strobe, flashing, or harsh full-white fills.
Cosmic background stays soft/low-contrast — visibility first.
Kids and Public Visitor lenses receive gentle wording only — no deploy, billing, or gate jargon in panel copy.
No microphones, cameras, GPS, or network calls from this panel.
Panel is visualization + text only — zero execution buttons.
Z-ROOT-7B parallax tilt is disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is set.
Orbit drift defaults off when reduced motion is requested; Still/Orbit toggle is non-executing preference only.
forbidden_claims: Religious proof or doctrinal certainty from a dashboard graphic
Animal mysticism as factual metaphysical powers
Medical diagnosis or treatment advice from guardian mascots
Live omniscience or real-world sensing from symbolic nodes
Certified compliance solely because this panel exists

future_gates.summary: Optional future mode: citation-backed checks only, human-gated — not silent scraping.
Any voice, lens, or ambient input requires consent UX + DRP + minimization review before wiring.
Optional future Z-ROOT-7C: heavier WebGL/Three.js constellation only if 3D-lite is insufficient and governance approves.
